The research focuses on the performance optimization of Intrusion Detection Systems (IDS) using Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) models. The attack mechanism used is Denial-of-Service (DoS) cyber-attacks, which are a type of malicious attack that aims to make a computer or network resource unavailable by overwhelming it with traffic.

The impact of this attack can be significant, including:

1. Disruption of network services: DoS attacks can cause network services to become unavailable, disrupting business operations and causing financial losses.
2. Data corruption: DoS attacks can also cause data corruption,
